commit.message:
[Lilliput] Crash in Parallel heap inspection

Fix bug in Parallel heap iteration when handling forwarded objects
that have been expanded during the copy. We need to know the size
of the original object for the iteration, which in that case is not
the size of the forwarded object, and can cause a crash.

We couldn't previously rely on is_forwarded_expanded because it was
not set by forward_to_atomic, so updated that - now we can rely on it.

size_forwarded copies the logic from ShenandoahForwarding::size, but
that uses some Shenandoah internal stuff so I didn't update that to use
the new shared logic.
